title: GSkard-Modpack
description: This modpack aims to provide basic optimization and convenience for the GSkard map.
body:
# GSkard-Modpack

This modpack aims to provide basic optimization and convenience for the [GSkard](https://hartgs.yw-games.top) map.

## Features

- Basic optimization mods, such as Sodium
- Held item information display
- In-game input method fix
- More LAN configuration options
- LabPBR shader settings enabled by default
- Built-in map and resource packs, no need to download again

<details>
<summary>Mods</summary>
  
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/Wb5oqrBJ)
- [Chat Impressive Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/DnL1AGAI)

## Q&A

- Q: What languages does the map support?   
  A: Currently only supports Simplified Chinese, if you want to help with translations, check [here](https://github.com/HartGS/GSkard-datapack/tree/localization/GSkard-Resourcepack/assets/kards/lang).
